original_query: select    min(s_store_name)   ,min(s_company_id)   ,min(s_street_number)   ,min(s_street_name)   ,min(s_suite_number)   ,min(s_city)   ,min(s_zip)   ,min(ss_ticket_number)   ,min(ss_sold_date_sk)   ,min(sr_returned_date_sk)   ,min(ss_item_sk)   ,min(d1.d_date_sk) from    store_sales   ,store_returns   ,store   ,date_dim d1   ,date_dim d2 where     d2.d_moy = 8 and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk and ss_sold_date_sk   = d1.d_date_sk and sr_returned_date_sk   = d2.d_date_sk and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk and sr_store_sk = s_store_sk and d1.d_date between (d2.d_date - interval '120' day)                and d2.d_date and d1.d_dow = 5 and s_state in ('IN','NM','VA')  ;
rewritten_query:
SELECT
    MIN(s.s_store_name),
    MIN(s.s_company_id),
    MIN(s.s_street_number),
    MIN(s.s_street_name),
    MIN(s.s_suite_number),
    MIN(s.s_city),
    MIN(s.s_zip),
    MIN(ss.ss_ticket_number),
    MIN(ss.ss_sold_date_sk),
    MIN(sr.sr_returned_date_sk),
    MIN(ss.ss_item_sk),
    MIN(d1.d_date_sk)
FROM date_dim d2
JOIN store_returns sr ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN store_sales ss 
    ON ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk
    AND ss.ss_customer_sk = sr.sr_customer_sk
    AND ss.ss_store_sk = sr.sr_store_sk
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
WHERE d2.d_moy = 8
    AND d1.d_date BETWEEN (d2.d_date - INTERVAL '120' DAY) AND d2.d_date
    AND d1.d_dow = 5
    AND s.s_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA');

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Use explicit JOIN syntax with all necessary join conditions in the ON clauses instead of using comma-separated tables with conditions in the WHERE clause. Include all equality conditions between store_sales and store_returns in the JOIN condition.
Remove the redundant condition 'sr_store_sk = s_store_sk' since it's implied by the other join conditions (ss_store_sk = sr_store_sk and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk).
